title: Foundation + Data Layer (Steps 1-3)
description: Go module init, project skeleton, Makefile, technologies/powershell.yaml, internal/techdef (loading, parsing, validation with TDD), internal/config (struct, validation with TDD). See design-docs/SPEC-stage-1.md Sections 2-4.3. TDD: write failing tests first, then implement. Atomic commits per skill.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-foundation-1/doozer-scaffold-2eb6. TDD commits: red/green pattern for techdef and config packages.

title: Templates + Scaffold Engine + Acceptance Tests (Steps 4-5, 7)
description: All template files in templates/, internal/templates (loading, rendering with TDD), internal/scaffold (Generate function, structure creation, gitignore composition, devcontainer composition with TDD), tests/acceptance (max/min selection tests). See design-docs/SPEC-stage-1.md Sections 5-7. Depends on foundation (doozer-scaffold-2eb6). TDD: write failing tests first, then implement. Atomic commits per skill.
closeReason: Completed templates package, scaffold engine, and acceptance tests. Templates package provides embedded Go template loading/rendering. Scaffold package implements Generate() with structure creation, gitignore composition, devcontainer composition. Acceptance tests verify max-selection and min-selection scenarios. All squashed into 3 atomic conventional commits.

title: Prompts + CLI Wiring + CI (Steps 6, 8)
description: internal/prompt (huh interactive prompts, dynamic tech options), wire main.go with full CLI flow, .github/workflows/ci.yml (project's own CI), .golangci.yml. See design-docs/SPEC-stage-1.md Sections 4, 8-9. Depends on foundation (doozer-scaffold-2eb6). TDD where applicable. Atomic commits per skill.
closeReason: Implemented Steps 6+8: internal/prompt package (huh interactive prompts, BuildTechOptions with sorted dynamic tech options), main.go CLI wiring (os.Args, techdef.Load, prompt.Run, confirmed check), .github/workflows/ci.yml (lint/test/build), .golangci.yml (6 linters), .gitignore. All on branch overstory/builder-prompt-cli/doozer-scaffold-1da5.

title: CLI wiring + Prompt + CI/Lint config (Steps 6, 8)
description: Implement remaining Stage 1 items: (1) internal/prompt/prompt.go - interactive prompt flow using huh per spec Section 4.2, (2) cmd/doozer-scaffold/main.go - full wiring with CLI arg handling, techdef loading, prompt, scaffold invocation per spec Section 4.4, (3) .github/workflows/ci.yml - project's own CI pipeline per spec Section 8, (4) .golangci.yml - linter config per spec Section 8.1, (5) root .gitignore for the project. All code per design-docs/SPEC-stage-1.md. TDD where applicable. Squash red/green micro-commits into conventional atomic commits before merge.
closeReason: Implemented internal/prompt/prompt.go (huh interactive form flow), full cmd/doozer-scaffold/main.go CLI wiring, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .golangci.yml, and .gitignore. All tests pass.
